scripts.dev:aflow: bun run build:ui && bun packages/server/scripts/generate-static-ui-assets.ts && bun run aflow
scripts.dev:specflow: bun run build:ui && bun packages/server/scripts/generate-static-ui-assets.ts && bun packages/cli/src/specflow.ts
scripts.build:specflow: bun packages/server/scripts/generate-static-ui-assets.ts && SPECFLOW_VERSION=$(bun packages/cli/src/version.ts package-version package.json) bun build --compile --target=bun --sourcemap=none --env=SPECFLOW_* packages/cli/src/specflow.ts --outfile specflow
scripts.build:aflow: AFLOW_VERSION=$(bun packages/cli/src/version.ts package-version package.json) bun build --compile --target=bun --sourcemap=none --env=SPECFLOW_* --env=AFLOW_* packages/aflow/src/cli.ts --outfile aflow
scripts.build:bin: bun run build:specflow && bun run build:aflow
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:bin
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/agent-proxy typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/workflow typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/bridge typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/ui typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/aflow typecheck
